name: recall
context_prose: E22 · recall is the recall pipeline component: the only subcommand currently extracted into a peer package alongside internal/cli. It is pure logic — every I/O and LLM call enters through DI interfaces (`Finder`, `Reader`, `SummarizerI`, `MemoryLister`) plus optional `WithExternalSources` / `WithStatusWriter` options. The Orchestrator composes a multi-phase ranked extraction over session transcripts, engram memories, auto-memory, skills, and CLAUDE.md/rules, capped by a byte budget so Haiku call counts stay bounded. Mode A (empty query) returns raw stripped transcript tail plus session-windowed memories; Mode B (non-empty query) runs the full ranked pipeline ending in a structured summary.
legend_items: Blue components = sibling components in c3-engram-cli-binary.md.
Grey = external systems (E5 Anthropic API reached via E26 · anthropic).
Solid edges = runtime calls; dotted edges = DI back-edges (function values wired by E21 · cli).
All edges traceable to a relationship in c3-engram-cli-binary.md.

edges.label: reads CLAUDE.md / rules / auto-memory / skills via FileCache
DI back-edge: Finder, Reader, SummarizerI, MemoryLister, externalFiles, statusWriter, dataDir

properties.name: Sessions sorted newest-first
properties.statement: For all listings returned by the injected DirLister, `SessionFinder.Find` returns FileEntry slices sorted by Mtime descending.
properties.notes: Pure sort over the lister output; lister errors propagate wrapped.

properties.name: Finder errors wrapped
properties.statement: For all errors returned by the injected DirLister, `SessionFinder.Find` returns a wrapped error containing the substring "listing sessions".
properties.notes: Error contract that callers (Orchestrator.Recall) rely on.

properties.name: Transcript reader respects byte budget
properties.statement: For all transcript paths P and budgets B>0, `TranscriptReader.Read(P, B)` returns content whose accumulated byte count does not exceed B once at least one line has been included.
properties.notes: First line is always included even if it alone exceeds B (bytesRead>0 guard).

properties.name: Tail-biased budgeting
properties.statement: For all transcript files exceeding the budget, `TranscriptReader.Read` returns a contiguous suffix of the stripped transcript (most recent lines), in chronological order.
properties.notes: Backward iteration to choose startIdx, then forward write.

properties.name: Mode B phase order is deterministic
properties.statement: For all non-empty queries Q in Mode B, phases run in fixed order: engram-memory, auto-memory, per-session, skills, CLAUDE.md/rules, then a single SummarizeFindings call.
properties.notes: Priority order is part of the contract — earlier phases get budget priority.

properties.name: Bounded Haiku call count
properties.statement: For all Mode B invocations with N skills and M auto-memory topics, the total Haiku call count is ≤ 2 (rank) + per-phase extracts capped by `DefaultExtractCap` + 1 (CLAUDE.md combined) + 1 (synthesis), independent of N and M.
properties.notes: Cost-control invariant. With 50 skills + 20 topics, ≤50 calls is expected.

properties.name: Extract phases respect byte cap
properties.statement: For all phases (auto-memory, skills, CLAUDE.md/rules), the phase function returns 0 immediately when bytesUsed≥bytesCap and never appends past the cap on entry.
properties.notes: Entry-time gate; in-loop check `bytesUsed+added>=bytesCap` then breaks.

properties.name: Nil summarizer is graceful
properties.statement: For all phase functions, a nil SummarizerI causes the phase to return 0 without panicking and without invoking the cache.
properties.notes: Mode B as a whole also returns empty Result when summarizer is nil.

properties.name: Mode A budget cap
properties.statement: For all Mode A invocations, the accumulated raw transcript content has length ≤ `DefaultModeABudget` (15KB).
properties.notes: Reader is invoked with the remaining budget so it self-throttles.

properties.name: Reader errors skip session, do not fail recall
properties.statement: For all Reader errors on a single session, both Mode A and Mode B's per-session extraction skip that session and continue with the next, never propagating the error.
properties.notes: Per-session resilience — a corrupt transcript does not poison recall.

properties.name: RecallMemoriesOnly limit honored
properties.statement: For all queries Q and limits L>0, `RecallMemoriesOnly(ctx, Q, L)` returns at most L memories; L≤0 is replaced by `DefaultMemoryLimit` (10).
properties.notes: Limit applied after sort so the L most relevant survive.

properties.name: Memory ranking by source then recency
properties.statement: For all matched memory sets, results are ordered: human-sourced before agent-sourced, and within each group most-recent UpdatedAt first.
properties.notes: Stable sort.Slice over (source==human, UpdatedAt).

properties.name: Memory disabled when wires absent
properties.statement: For all invocations with nil memoryLister or empty dataDir, `RecallMemoriesOnly` returns an empty Result and the engram-memory phase contributes 0 bytes to Mode B.
properties.notes: Optional dependency — Mode A still works without memory wiring.

properties.name: Nil HaikuCaller returns sentinel
properties.statement: For all calls to `Summarizer.ExtractRelevant` or `SummarizeFindings` with a nil HaikuCaller, the methods return `ErrNilCaller` without panicking.
properties.notes: Sentinel exported for caller-side `errors.Is` checks.

properties.name: Mode A windows memories per session
properties.statement: For all Mode A invocations with a memoryLister, only memories whose UpdatedAt falls within some session's [prevMtime, mtime] window (or [mtime-24h, mtime] for the oldest) are included.
properties.notes: Inter-session windowing aligns memories to the session that produced them.

properties.name: Empty Mode B buffer skips synthesis
properties.statement: For all Mode B invocations where every phase contributes zero bytes, the orchestrator returns an empty Result without invoking SummarizeFindings.
properties.notes: Avoids a wasted Haiku synthesis call when there is nothing to summarize.

properties.name: FileCache shared across phases
properties.statement: For all Mode B invocations, every external file read by auto-memory, skill, and CLAUDE.md/rules phases goes through the same `*externalsources.FileCache`, so each path is read at most once per invocation.
properties.notes: Architectural invariant — cache is wired once via `WithExternalSources`. UNTESTED at the recall level (cache itself has its own unit tests).

properties.name: Nil status writer is silent
properties.statement: For all Orchestrator invocations without `WithStatusWriter`, no progress messages are emitted and `writeStatusf` is a no-op.
properties.notes: Default Orchestrator has statusWriter==nil.

properties.name: Cancellation yields partial results
properties.statement: For all contexts canceled mid-recall, Mode A returns the partial accumulated content with nil error, and Mode B's per-session and ranked phases break out of their loops without propagating ctx.Err().
properties.notes: Deliberate: partial recall content is more useful to the agent than an error.

properties.name: All I/O via DI
properties.statement: For all functions in `internal/recall`, no call is made to `os.*`, `http.*`, or any direct file/network primitive; every external effect enters through Finder, Reader, SummarizerI, MemoryLister, or externalsources.FileCache.
properties.notes: Architectural rule from CLAUDE.md ("DI everywhere"). UNTESTED — would need a static check (e.g., grep + lint) to enforce mechanically.
